signals.headline: Wembanyama Concussion Confirmed, Out for Spurs | NO (Spurs advance) | HIGH confidence** [1][4]
signals.raw:
Wembanyama Concussion Confirmed, Out for Spurs | NO (Spurs advance) | HIGH confidence** [1][4]

San Antonio's star exited Game 2 vs. Portland with a concussion and was quickly ruled out, confirmed post-debut as DPOY finalist, shifting odds heavily against them.[1][4]

signals.headline: Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Spurs | YES (Lakers favored to advance) | HIGH confidence** [1][2]
signals.raw:
Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Spurs | YES (Lakers favored to advance) | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

Lakers secured a 2-0 lead against the San Antonio Spurs in the first round, with LeBron James leading without Luka Doncic (not on roster), boosting their series win probability amid ongoing games.[1][2] Spurs' Victor Wembanyama ruled out after Game 2 concussion vs. Trail Blazers (different matchup)

signals.headline: Polymarket Traders on X Focus on Elon Musk Tweet Counts as Top Trending Topic | NO | LOW confidence**
